phase_name: Reproducible Tauri desktop release with exact frontend closure and atomic multi-platform publication

quality.ruff: validated by locked CI; source-level regressions covered locally
quality.format: Python/JavaScript syntax and shell syntax verified locally; Rust format enforced in CI
quality.javascript_tests_passed: dependency-backed suite mandatory in CI; npm registry unavailable on packaging host
quality.offline_browser_proof: WASM + WebGPU neural model + IndexedDB restore verified

local_python_validation.available_suites: 72 unique release, API, configuration, and bundle-verifier tests passed
local_python_validation.full_dependency_complete_suite: mandatory in CI; local host lacks pycrdt, fakeredis, ONNX Python packages, and npm dependencies

quality.rust_local_revalidation: not-run: Cargo/rustc unavailable on packaging host; complete workspace lock and --locked CI gates retained
quality.sovereign_desktop_audit: 196/196 passed across the clean release source tree

sovereign_test_matrix.note: Blocked entries are missing external dependencies/toolchains and are not counted as passes.

quality.javascript_tests_available: 58-file syntax pass; exact 44-file packaged closure verified; dependency-backed tests remain mandatory in CI
quality.native_installer_builds: not-run locally: macOS and Windows hosted runners unavailable; draft-first atomic matrix retained
quality.rust_tests_scope: full workspace fmt, Clippy, tests, and WASM build are mandatory with --locked in CI and release CI

governance.security_policy: supported versions, private reporting, declared limitations

security.http_content_length: negative and conflicting duplicate values rejected

tauri_desktop.csp: explicit restrictive policy with local-only IPC and required WASM/eval allowances for vendored ONNX runtime
tauri_desktop.capabilities: separate local-only main and mini-assistant capability sets
tauri_desktop.document_writes: staged create-new write, fsync, commit rename, Windows rollback recovery

v2_phase_1.personalization_policy: style matches annotated/re-weighted only; errors never suppressed

vmax_phase_1.overlap_resolution: O(n log n), AVL in Python and BTreeMap in Rust
vmax_phase_1.literal_rules: single Aho-Corasick scan in Python and Rust
vmax_phase_1.analysis_context: shared immutable tokens, normalized forms, sentence index, and syntax parse

vmax_phase_5.pwa: atomic versioned precache; CacheFirst immutable NLP assets; StaleWhileRevalidate app shell
vmax_phase_5.indexeddb: documents, Yjs updates, outbox, personal dictionaries, settings
vmax_phase_5.rendering: worker analysis, composited overlay, frame-batched diagnostics, virtualized issue cards
vmax_phase_5.performance_browser_case: 19,506 characters, 2,500 diagnostics, 8 rendered cards, zero observed long tasks over 50ms

limitations: Rate limiting is in-memory per worker and is not distributed across nodes.
API keys are static environment secrets, not multi-tenant identity or OAuth.
PII masking covers the requested e-mail, phone, and URL patterns; it is not a comprehensive DLP system.
The controlled benchmark is template-generated and must not be quoted as natural-corpus accuracy.
No third-party penetration test or published production load/SLO report was completed.
Docker and Compose were statically validated; a container runtime was unavailable in the build environment.
SBOM generation, supply-chain signing, distributed queues, and backup/failure drills remain future work.
A real multi-node Redis chaos/load test with TLS and ACL remains required before an Internet-facing production deployment.
The 0.09ms response target is not an SLA; latency is measured at runtime and depends on text length, hardware, and backend.
Native macOS DMG and Windows NSIS/MSI installers were not built on the Linux packaging host; platform CI must produce and smoke-test them.
Cargo/rustc and selected npm/Python dependency packages were unavailable in the packaging environment, so those entries remain explicitly blocked in the validation matrix.

repository_release.profile: Dhad v1.0.0 Sovereign Edition offline-first desktop source release with required runtime binaries and platform bundling configuration

major_hardening: atomic concurrent neural initialization and bounded verified asset streaming
WebSocket frame and buffered-byte backpressure with observed async callbacks
strict HTTP framing and consistent HTTP/WebSocket API-key authentication
tracked sync-hub tasks and deterministic cancellation-safe shutdown
indexed IndexedDB Yjs reads and recoverable outbox flush sequencing
workspace-level Rust/WASM profiles, strict CI, Dependabot, and repository SHA-256 inventory
self-healing secure Yjs outbound queue, explicit outbox recovery error reporting, and leak-free worker dispatch failures

local_validation.native_crdt: not re-executed locally: compatible pycrdt unavailable

major_evolution: recovery/live cursor deduplication and bounded Redis Stream replay
strict WebSocket ordering, backpressure, and cancellation-safe lifecycle
bounded HTTP framing, rate-limiter state, and backend analysis concurrency
single-allocation neural super-batches and abortable verified asset loading
self-healing neural workers after crash, timeout, or dispatch failure
atomic IndexedDB Yjs sequencing and indexed bounded outbox recovery
bounded E2EE inputs and pending key packages with old-key zeroization
tiered PWA caching with optional on-demand offline neural assets
expanded RTL accessibility and explicit degraded/offline error recovery
deterministic Omni inventory and release validation evidence

local_validation.onnx_python: not executed locally: native onnxruntime unavailable

major_evolution: unified explainable writing-intelligence report across Python SDK and REST
real-time academic, formal, casual, and persuasive tone analysis with actionable chips
offline regional dialect detection and review-only Modern Standard Arabic conversion bridge
live clarity, complexity, lexical richness, hapax, clause, and sentence-density metrics
source-anchored interactive linguistic explanations for every diagnostic
persistent device-local custom lexicon and rule overrides shared by worker and API contracts
accessible RTL intelligence dashboard, keyboard issue navigation, ARIA tooltips, and connectivity feedback
single-parse backend intelligence path with reusable AnalysisContext
Rust tokenizer code-point offsets without a document-sized byte lookup table
one-pass aggressive normalization without temporary mapped strings or token vectors
Apex PWA cache generation including the offline intelligence module

local_validation.rust: not re-executed locally: cargo/rustc unavailable; parity tests retained for CI

capabilities: five-mode conservative smart rewriting with provenance and safe fact preservation
client-side TXT, Markdown, semantic DOCX, and PDF document workflows
sentence heatmaps and longitudinal writing analytics stored locally
six fact-bounded smart templates with explicit required fields
shared PWA and Chrome/Edge extension capability contract
system, light, dark, and high-contrast themes with accessible RTL interactions
formatting-preserving corrections, rewrites, template insertion, and voice dictation

local_validation.zip_integrity: passed; every final archive entry CRC-tested
